items.title: Spotify says artists from 75 countries made $500K+ in royalties in 2025, up from 66 in 2024; ~50% of an average artist's streams came from outside their country (Ethan Millman/The Hollywood Reporter)

items.title_zh: Spotify 表示，到 2025 年，来自 75 个国家的艺术家的版税收入将超过 50 万美元，高于 2024 年的 66 个国家；平均约 50% 的艺术家直播来自国外（Ethan Millman/好莱坞报道）
